headline: FedEx SameDay Local And AI Push Reframe Growth And Execution Story
summary: FedEx (NYSE:FDX) has launched FedEx SameDay Local, a rapid delivery solution focused on time-definite local shipments. The service is powered in part by a partnership with last mile logistics platform OneRail. FedEx also plans to roll out AI-enabled automation and predictive systems across more than half of its operational workflows by 2028. For investors watching NYSE:FDX, this move pushes the company deeper into same day and on demand delivery, a segment where customer expectations around...
